title: Supply Chain Manager - Air India Cargo - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Air India Cargo - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Air India Cargo family as a Supply Chain Manager in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Air India Cargo:
Air India Cargo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India Cargo!
